artPrompt: A vast sludge leviathan glides through the black depths of the poisoned reservoir, only its glistening ridged back and one luminous eye breaching the murky green surface as sickly bioluminescence trails through the water. Crumbling treatment towers and a bruised stormy sky loom over the still shoreline. Epic, dread-filled film-still framing of submerged colossal scale, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Reservoir Leviathan
text:
Trample
Feed (Whenever a player rolls one or more dice, flips one or more coins, or votes, put a sludge counter on this creature.)
The Reservoir Leviathan gets +1/+1 for each sludge counter on it.
Whenever The Reservoir Leviathan attacks, it deals damage equal to the number of sludge counters on it to each player other than you. It is everyone's problem now. It is mostly their problem.
flavorText: Sonar pinged something at the bottom. The something pinged back, politely, then ate the sonar.
